top.news-title: Tesla Earnings: The moment of truth
top.news:
Despite all of the controversy surrounding the electric car-maker Tesla Motors, its shares are still a coveted asset. Over the past 6 months, the stock has risen by nearly 25%, and in the past 3 months alone it gained a shocking 55%. And yet there are investors who are selling Tesla off, because they believe this rally is based purely on sentiment and not backed by a substantial growth in sales. That’s why the upcoming earnings report is essential to making the right trading decision.

Do you have faith in Tesla? Then make sure you take advantage of the special 87% profitability on Tesla options!
top.use: Tesla, Inc. is expected to report earnings on February 22nd, 2017 after market close. EPS forecast is at $-1.19 while same quarter previous year was at $-1.29. If the numbers disappoint this time, the stock can easily gap down.
top.warn: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid on February 22-23  from 14:40 to 21:00 GMT.
